title: American Roulette
description: This mod allows you to play American roulette using your resources as bets!
body:
## **About:**
Add excitement to your Minecraft! This mini-mod adds a decorative block that allows you to play American Roulette using your in-game resources. Just craft the Roulette Wheel, put in any resource or item, and place your bet!

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3481f17aaa977b3d0e8d01f1cfe7d03f6fae91aa.png) 
![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5cfc5e8a2fd49b01cb3b99cf1729e54f4bc3c9f.png)

### Credits:
